headline: Ecolab Southeast Asia launches intelligent solutions, wins innovation award at THAIFEX - HOREC Asia 2026
summary: Ecolab, a global leader in water, hygiene and infection prevention solutions, today announced the Southeast Asia launch of two breakthrough innovations — Ecolab DishIQ™ and the Ecolab AquaIQ™ Program at THAIFEX HOREC Asia, the region's defining event for the hospitality and foodservice sector. This year, THAIFEX HORECA Asia brings together hotels, restaurants, cafés and catering (HORECA) decision‑makers.

content.title: Ecolab Southeast Asia launches intelligent solutions, wins innovation award at THAIFEX - HOREC Asia 2026
content.summary: Ecolab, a global leader in water, hygiene and infection prevention solutions, today announced the Southeast Asia launch of two breakthrough innovations — Ecolab DishIQ™ and the Ecolab AquaIQ™ Program at THAIFEX HOREC Asia, the region's defining event for the hospitality and foodservice sector. This year, THAIFEX HORECA Asia brings together hotels, restaurants, cafés and catering (HORECA) decision‑makers.

thumbnail.caption: Awarding ceremony with Preeyakorn Sankhavanija, director of the Office of Agricultural and Industrial Trade Promotion, Department of International Trade Promotion, Ministry of Commerce Thailand, and Audrey Low, vice-president & general manager, Ecolab Southeast Asia, Institutional Business.

headline: A Look At Ecolab (ECL) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Ecolab (ECL) has been drawing attention after recent share weakness, with the stock showing a 1.6% decline over the past day and a 7% move lower over the past week. See our latest analysis for Ecolab. Zooming out, the recent 7.0% 7 day share price pullback and 3.9% 30 day share price decline come after a 6.0% 90 day share price gain and a 9.7% 1 year total shareholder return. This suggests that some momentum is cooling following a stronger run. If this price action has you thinking about...

headline: Ecolab Announces Global 10-14% Energy Surcharge
summary: ST. PAUL, Minn., March 12, 2026--Ecolab today reaffirmed its long-term commitment to secure supply and ensure service to any customer, anywhere in the world, amid sharply rising global energy costs and sourcing challenges. As part of our ongoing efforts to manage extraordinary cost pressures while continuing to deliver incremental total value to customers, we will implement a global 10-14% energy surcharge, depending on local market conditions, on all our products and services, effective April 1

content.title: Ecolab Announces Global 10-14% Energy Surcharge
content.summary: ST. PAUL, Minn., March 12, 2026--Ecolab today reaffirmed its long-term commitment to secure supply and ensure service to any customer, anywhere in the world, amid sharply rising global energy costs and sourcing challenges. As part of our ongoing efforts to manage extraordinary cost pressures while continuing to deliver incremental total value to customers, we will implement a global 10-14% energy surcharge, depending on local market conditions, on all our products and services, effective April 1
